# Heatwave — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An online swimwear store focused on selling swimwear products through an e-commerce platform. The business operates in the fashion and apparel industry with a direct-to-consumer online retail model.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Heatwave
An online swimwear store focused on selling swimwear products through an e-commerce platform. The business operates in the fashion and apparel industry with a direct-to-consumer online retail model.

## Services/Products
- מכירת בגדי ים

## Target Audience
- חובבי חוף וים
- משפיעני אופנה ברשתות חברתיות
- נשים צעירות

## Industry
אופנה וביגוד
